column1: 5pm Debby Update:  Here is the latest update on Tropical Storm Debby. No changes to track or intensity. Still a tropical storm with winds of 65 mph. Rapid intensification seems unlikely given the short time span before landfall, but the NHC still is forecasting Debby to become a hurricane later tonight. Updates at 5 on ABC Action News and 24/7 social media updates right here.
I’ll watch what you say Denis Phillips
